raw_output: {"predictions": [{"common_name": "Lesser Scaup", "scientific_name": "Aythya affinis", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.9, "field_marks": "Dark brown head with yellow eye, pale face patch at the base of a dark bill, mottled brown body plumage, typical diving duck shape swimming on open water"}, {"common_name": "Greater Scaup", "scientific_name": "Aythya marila", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.7, "field_marks": "Similar overall dark head, yellow eye and dull body plumage, differs from Lesser Scaup in subtle head shape and bill markings, consistent with female non-breeding scaup appearance"}, {"common_name": "Tufted Duck", "scientific_name": "Aythya fuligula", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.5, "field_marks": "Dark brown head, yellow eye, dark bill, lacks the prominent tuft expected for the species, matches female non-breeding Aythya duck general form"}, {"common_name": "Aythya diving duck", "scientific_name": "Aythya sp.", "rank_hint": "genus", "confidence": 0.95, "field_marks": "Typical diving duck body profile, dark head, yellow iris, broad dark bill, uniform brownish body plumage confirming placement in the Aythya genus"}, {"common_name": "Anatidae waterfowl", "scientific_name": "Anatidae sp.", "rank_hint": "family", "confidence": 0.98, "field_marks": "Swimming duck morphology, webbed feet (submerged), compact waterfowl shape confirming membership in the Anatidae family"}], "abstain": false, "abstain_reason": null, "overall_confidence": 0.9}
